# Sharing Travel Experiences of Japan: Japan Travel by NAVITIME
[
Travel Tips](https://japantravel.navitime.com/en/area/jp/interest/tl11/)
CONTENTS

*

*

*
For those who are planning on visiting Japan

![](https://article-image.travel.navitime.jp/img/NTJtrvpr0035-en/top.png)
I am happy to introduce a new feature for travelers to Japan, which will support pre-trip and after-trip phases of the customer journey. Users of our service will be able to create and share their travel experiences to Japan as an itinerary, which other users can search for and learn from.
[See shared users' itineraries >](inboundnavitimewalk://itinerarylist)
*
## For those who have been to Japan
Create an itinerary as a memoir of your Japan trip!
The new feature allows you to create a detailed itinerary with access to various resources available in the Japan Travel app, including maps, spots, and transit search. Share the itinerary you’ve created so that other travelers can learn from your past experiences.
![]()
*
## For those who are in Japan now
Search through the itinerary database to find ideas for your travel. If you have created your itinerary, it will help you keep track of the events and transportation during your trip.
After your trip, share your itinerary with others.
![]()
*
## How to share your itinerary
Start by going to the Publish tab under the Trip menu.
Select the itinerary you want to share.
![]()
Upload your pictures and leave comments of your trip.
![]()
Remember to set tags and keywords. Select tags from a list.
The tag list (on Website): [https://japantravel.navitime.com/en/area/jp/plan/tag/tl01/](https://japantravel.navitime.com/en/area/jp/plan/tag/tl01/)
![]()
*
## For those who are planning on visiting Japan
If you are considering visiting Japan, look for ideas on places to go, or see how others traveled across Japan using public transportation. The experience of others are full of ideas and tips that may be helpful for your trip.
![]()
[View in App](inboundnavitimewalk://itinerarylist)
[View on Website](https://japantravel.navitime.com/en/plan/)
2023.08.17
NAVITIME TRAVEL EDITOR
